posts.text:
Hoping for a Venezuela but getting a North Korea instead…


Adam Cancryn (@adamcancryn)

Trump was specifically cautioned that the “most likely”outcome of killing Khamenei was that he would be replaced by another similarly hardline leader.
But officials still went into the strikes hoping they’d ultimately result in a friendlier face atop Iran
